summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new features: Forgot Password flow, Seasonal Theme Banner, and ToLet Photo Verification. All backend APIs (18/18 tests) and frontend UI flows working correctly.

issues: Shows 'Go online to see available tasks' when rider is offline - this is expected behavior, not a bug

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed ToLet tasks created during testing for photo verification flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified working: (1) Forgot Password with SMS/Email OTP - full flow tested including request OTP, verify OTP, reset password, and login with new password. (2) Seasonal Holi theme banner visible on customer home with animated particles, 10% OFF badge, and LIMITED TIME indicator. (3) ToLet task completion requires proof images (one per board), admin can view pending verification tasks with photo thumbnails, and approve/reject with reason.

forgot_password.ui_verified: Forgot Password link, phone input, SMS/Email toggle, OTP input, new password form

seasonal_banner.ui_verified: Holi banner with 'Happy Holi! Get 10% off on visit bookings', animated particles, 10% OFF badge, LIMITED TIME indicator

endpoints_tested: GET /api/tolet-tasks/available - Get available tasks for rider
POST /api/tolet-tasks/{id}/complete - Complete task with proof images
tolet_photo_verification.ui_verified: Admin ToLet panel shows pending verification section with photo thumbnails, Review/Approve/Reject buttons, earnings display, task statuses (Verified, Rejected, Awaiting Review)

mocked_apis_list: SMS/Email OTP sending - OTP returned in API response for testing (otp_for_testing field)
